rationale: The citing note says the 2023 paper “extends prior work on privacy valuation malleability and the privacy paradox,” and the 2012 cited paper is directly about malleable disclosure driven by contextual relative standards (others’ admissions and question-order intrusiveness). Given this strong topical/theoretical linkage in privacy disclosure mechanisms (not just a distant domain match), this citation could be serving as a substantive prior-work foundation and should be reviewed in full.
